code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut product = 1
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        product = product * v
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("product=#{product}")
